transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good evening, First National Bank. My name is Ellie. Can I take your full name and date of birth to verify you?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Evening. Amir Hassan, twenty-sixth of August 1987.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you Mr. Hassan, verified. How can I help?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I made a bank transfer to pay an invoice — one thousand two hundred — on Wednesday morning. It's now Friday evening and the company says they haven't received it.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can see that transfer left on Wednesday at 10:43. The sort code and account on the payment — do you have those to hand?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Those match exactly what we have. For a business payment of this size at the end of the week, I'm raising a formal payment trace now so we're not relying on the weekend to sort it.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Trace reference TRC-2024-4619. Our payments team will contact the receiving bank first thing Monday. You should have an update by midday Monday. Shall I also note the invoice reference on your account?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Noted. Is there anything else I can help with?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: No, that's everything. Thank you Ellie.
